title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
